items.title: Releases Notes
items.summary: Version 2.1.2 April 26, 2026 April 18, 2026 April 12, 2026 April 6, 2026 New Notarized Apple Developer Direct in-app updates now supported Full database…
items.content_html:
Version 2.1.2

April 26, 2026

New

  • Add clickable annotation and extend screen-time menu item in to control menu on menu bar
  • Option to disable Auto Check Updates on Settings
  • Restore latest selected sorting/grouping options on annotation tree

Fixes

  • Contextual highlight menu now reflect on RTL mode
  • Misplaced annotation view control buttons constraints on sequoia and earlier

Version 2.1.1

April 18, 2026

Fixes

  • Book titles now appear in annotations when grouped by tags
  • Fixed page and part not displayed when add annotation
  • Fixed a bug with the switch mode state in the toolbar when opening multiple windows
  • Restore last search field state in the sidebar on app launch
  • Under-the-hood improvements to reader state management for a smoother experience

Version 2.1

April 12, 2026

New

  • Add tagging system to annotations with completion suggestions

Changes

  • Highlight Arabic phrases and common symbols in text view
  • Refactor annotations panel to use titlebar accessory view
  • Refactor bulk download search field

Fixes

  • Fix Quran verse reselection on tafseer change
  • Fix misplaced search query highlighting
  • Fix font remapping (Al Bayan, remove Al Nile)
  • Fix search field appearance in split view accessory

Version 2.0

April 6, 2026

New

  • Notarized Apple Developer
  • Direct in-app updates now supported
  • Full database are not required
  • Options to use installed font on system
  • Parse and highlight {}, [], and () ibarot ranges
  • On Demand Book Download
  • Download Multiple Books at once
  • App Settings Management
  • Place Sidebar SearchField into splitViewItemAccessory

Fixes

  • Avoid adding .trackingSeparator into toolbar when using RTL locale
  • borderShape buttons in macOS Tahoe
  • Search on Current-Book after state restore

items.title: Books Request
items.summary: In order to keep the application in the Aswaja corridor, the application may only contain books that have been verified by the developer. To make…
items.content_html: In order to keep the application in the Aswaja corridor, the application may only contain books that have been verified by the developer. To make a book request, you can contact via email dev.kbcdrn@gmail.com with the subject "Book Request".

items.title: Kitab
items.summary: Kitab yang dapat diunduh di Aplikasi disimpan di server GitHub-Kitab Repo. Data Kitab diunggah ke GitHub-Releases. Semua ID Kitab telah diindeks dalam format .json yang…
items.content_html:
Kitab yang dapat diunduh di Aplikasi disimpan di server GitHub-Kitab Repo.

Data Kitab diunggah ke GitHub-Releases. Semua ID Kitab telah diindeks dalam format .json yang tersedia di repo.
